name: Frozen Piña Colada
description: A frozen tropical cocktail blended with coconut rum, coconut cream, pineapple juice, and ice. You've met the frozen Piña Colada, and you know where to enjoy it. See you on the pool deck!
recipe_steps: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Add 1 cup of ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a cherry flag.
searchable_text: Frozen Piña Colada main rum BACARDÍ Coconut rum A frozen tropical cocktail blended with coconut rum, coconut cream, pineapple juice, and ice. You've met the frozen Piña Colada, and you know where to enjoy it. See you on the pool deck! ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum, 37.5 ml coco Reàl®, 37.5 ml pineapple juice, 1 cup(s) ice recipe steps Combine all ingredients in a blender. Add 1 cup of ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Serve in a highball glass. Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a cherry flag.
